title: Please break my financial data MCP
author: Outrageous_Fall_1727
selftext:
I built a financial data MCP for AI agents so that:

You can say: “Scan these tickers and tell me which ones look weird this week.”  
It replies with indicators, recent moves, and key news/earnings instead of generic filler.

It’s in open beta and completely free right now. I’m specifically looking for people who will:

* spam it with edge‑case tickers
* ask cursed prompts
* tell me what tools/endpoints are missing

If your idea of fun is breaking someone’s weekend project (within reason), I’ll drop the url in the comments.

replies.author: Outrageous_Fall_1727
replies.body: Thanks! here is the url if you want to take a look :) [marketpulsemcp.com](http://marketpulsemcp.com)
